docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands ¶ properdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. properdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. properdocs build - Build the documentation site. properdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout ¶ properdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
